results.title: Estonia passes law obligating police to place warning signs ahead of mobile speed cameras
results.description: The Riigikogu on Wednesday passed amendments to the law that will require police to warn drivers about mobile speed cameras in the future.

results.title: Man in Singapore allegedly drove against traffic, sped up to 114kmh, hit school bus and left his car in flames
results.description: SINGAPORE: A man allegedly drove against the flow of traffic, hit speeds of around 114kmh, collided with a bus and a lamp post, and left his burning car. The incident left two children on the bus needing medical attention.

results.title: Build Wealth With Attention Capital, VFD Boss, Okpala Tells Young Nigerians
results.description: The Group Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of VFD Group Plc, Mr Nonso Okpala, has urged young Nigerians to embrace innovation, entrepreneurship and emerging digital opportunities as pathways to sustainable wealth creation, while stressing the growing importance of attention capital in today’s economy. Okpala made the call at the 2026 Pre-Conference Symposium of the [...]

results.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings (SONACOMS) – Daily Chart
results.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings (SONACOMS) – Daily Chart -Breakout/breakdown Awaited The stock has been consolidating in a well-defined range between ₹565 and ₹607 for the last several weeks after a sharp upmove. This type of sideways movement often acts as an accumulation phase before the next directional move. Key Observations: * Price is trading near the upper boundary of the consolidation zone (₹607). * Multiple attempts to cross ₹607 have faced resistance, making it a crucial breakout level. * Volume has declined during consolidation, indicating volatility compression. * RSI is around 56, holding above the 50 mark, which suggests a mildly bullish bias. Trading Levels Bullish Scenario * Sustained close above ₹607 may trigger a breakout. * Immediate targets: ₹650–₹680 * Positional targets: ₹714 and ₹759 Bearish Scenario * Breakdown below ₹565 could invalidate the setup. * Downside support zones: ₹540 and ₹520 Pattern View The chart resembles a rectangle/consolidation pattern after an impulsive rally. Support: ₹565, ₹540 Resistance: ₹607, ₹650 Targets: ₹714, ₹759 Disclaimer: This analysis is for educational purposes only and should not be considered investment advice. Please conduct your own research and use proper risk management before taking any trade.

results.title: Nagpur woman's ‘forced conversion’ case: Cleric accused of conducting 'rituals and nikah' surrenders
results.description: A cleric, the third accused in a Nagpur case involving alleged rape, blackmail, and forced religious conversion of a 24-year-old woman, surrendered to police. He is accused of facilitating her unwanted conversion and nikah. Two others were previously detained. The woman claims she was drugged, filmed, blackmailed, and extorted of nearly Rs 4 lakh.

results.title: Youth Climbs Electric Pole In Bhopal's MP Nagar, Rescue Operation Draws Huge Crowd-- VIDEO
results.description: A youth climbed an electric pole outside the Government Press in Bhopal's MP Nagar on Thursday, drawing a large crowd. After receiving information, police and the local administration reached the spot and launched a rescue operation. Using a hydraulic lift machine, the rescue team safely brought him down. The reason behind the incident is still unknown.

results.title: DWP confirms state pensioners sent letters as free TV licence link pushed
results.description: The Department for Work and Pensions is trying to get people to sign up to get the £238 payment - and it is linked to free television licences, a committee was told

results.title: Meta adds teen safety checks and parent alerts to Instagram and Facebook
results.description: Meta has expanded teen safety features across Instagram, Facebook and Messenger, introducing AI-powered age checks, 13+ content settings and parental alerts for self-harm searches.

results.title: El Niño emerges in India? Weak monsoon is one of the initial indicators
results.description: The weak start offers an early indication of how El Niño, which has recently emerged and is expected by US scientists to become one of the strongest on record, is beginning to influence global weather patterns.

results.title: Antisemites, Iran shills, and isolationists celebrate Iran deal: 'Jews lose'
results.description: Nick Fuentes, Tucker Carlson, Trita Parsi, and Hasan Piker among those to praise the Trump-Iran memorandum, portraying it as a victory for Iran and a setback for Israel.

results.title: Pentagon chief lashes out at NATO allies and announces a review of US forces in Europe
results.description: Hegseth’s comments largely mischaracterized European policies today.

results.title: Data security concerns stop 69% users from choosing to sell their phone, Cashify Survey Finds
results.description: Cashify, India’s leading re-commerce platform, released findings from its latest consumer survey on smartphone resale and data privacy. The survey of 8,000 respondents reveals that 74% are concerned about potential misuse of personal data after selling their smartphone, highlighting data security as a critical trust issue in India’s growing resale market. The findings come at [...] The post Data security concerns stop 69% users from choosing to sell their phone, Cashify Survey Finds appeared first on Mobility India .

results.title: WBJEE 2026 results today at 1.30 pm— see direct links to check rank card and final answer key
results.description: The West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board (WBJEEB) is releasing the WBJEE 2026 results today at 1:30 PM, with rank cards available at 4 PM. A press conference is scheduled for the result announcement. The board previously released the final answer key, noting one withdrawn question in Physics and Chemistry for which all candidates will receive marks.
